cert_web_empty: I haven't uploaded web certificates here yet. When I do, they will be listed with downloadable PDFs.
cert_other_empty: Certificates for backend or other areas will appear here when you add them to public/pdfs/ and register them in src/data/certificates.ts.
cert_intro_paragraph1: My training is self-taught; I dedicate at least four hours every day to study, including practice, review, reading, and new learning. I focus on web development, especially frontend, building interfaces and mastering modern technologies.
cert_intro_paragraph2: My goal is to become one of the best frontend developers by 2031 and work at Google.
